title: carpinus henryana var. simplicidentata
intro: Carpinus henryana var. simplicidentata, also known as the Chinese hornbeam, is a plant species belonging to the Betulaceae family. Traditionally, the plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its bark, leaves, and twigs, which are used to treat various health conditions. The Chinese hornbeam is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and treating digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
